sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { SparklesIcon, ChartBarIcon, DocumentTextIcon, AcademicCapIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ArrowRightIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon, LightBulbIcon, ClockIcon, ShieldCheckIcon, RocketLaunchIcon, CloudArrowUpIcon, CpuChipIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const Home = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); if (user) { window.location.href = '/dashboard'; return null; } const features = [ { icon: CloudArrowUpIcon, title: "Smart Resume Upload", description: "Upload your resume in PDF or DOCX format. Our AI extracts and analyzes your skills instantly.", color: "bg-blue-500", iconColor: "text-blue-600", bgLight: "bg-blue-50" }, { icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon, title: "Job Description Analysis", description: "Paste any job description and our AI compares it against your resume to find the perfect match.", color: "bg-purple-500", iconColor: "text-purple-600", bgLight: "bg-purple-50" }, { icon: ChartBarIcon, title: "ATS Score & Insights", description: "Get your resume's ATS compatibility score with detailed breakdowns and improvement tips.", color: "bg-green-500", iconColor: "text-green-600", bgLight: "bg-green-50" }, { icon: AcademicCapIcon, title: "Skill Gap Analysis", description: "Identify missing skills and get personalized learning recommendations to fill the gaps.", color: "bg-orange-500", iconColor: "text-orange-600", bgLight: "bg-orange-50" }, { icon: LightBulbIcon, title: "Smart Suggestions", description: "Receive actionable AI-powered recommendations to make your resume stand out to recruiters.", color: "bg-yellow-500", iconColor: "text-yellow-600", bgLight: "bg-yellow-50" }, { icon: ClockIcon, title: "Track Progress", description: "Save all your analyses and watch your resume improve over time with our history feature.", color: "bg-indigo-500", iconColor: "text-indigo-600", bgLight: "bg-indigo-50" } ]; const stats = [ { value: "98%", label: "Accuracy Rate", icon: CheckCircleIcon }, { value: "10,000+", label: "Resumes Analyzed", icon: DocumentTextIcon }, { value: "500+", label: "Skills Database", icon: AcademicCapIcon }, { value: "24/7", label: "AI Support", icon: SparklesIcon } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}
AI-Powered Resume Analysis

Get instant ATS scores, skill matching, and personalized recommendations to optimize your resume for any job role.

{/* Stats Section */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => (

{stat.value}

{stat.label}

))}
{/* Features Section */}

Powerful Features for Job Seekers

Everything you need to optimize your resume and stand out from the competition

{features.map((feature, index) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* How It Works */}

How It Works

Get your resume analyzed in 4 simple steps

{[ { step: "01", title: "Create Account", desc: "Sign up for free", icon: DocumentTextIcon }, { step: "02", title: "Upload Resume", desc: "Upload PDF or DOCX", icon: CloudArrowUpIcon }, { step: "03", title: "Paste Job Description", desc: "Copy from job posting", icon: MagnifyingGlassIcon }, { step: "04", title: "Get Analysis", desc: "Instant AI insights", icon: SparklesIcon } ].map((step, index) => (
{step.step}

{step.title}

{step.desc}

))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Land Your Dream Job?

Join thousands of successful job seekers using ResumeAI

No credit card required • Free forever

); }; export default Home;
